name: codex-exit-dominates-active-detection
title: Make Codex exit logs dominate active detection
description: Include temporary Chat workspaces, but stop showing completed threads when trailing Codex logs arrive after Agent loop exited.
creator: dev2019zheng
notes: Restored temporary Codex Desktop Chat workspace inclusion and changed activity detection so true codex_core::session::handlers Agent loop exited markers dominate short trailing logs. A new activity marker after a 15s settle window reactivates the thread. Checks: live SQLite query, cargo fmt --all -- --check, cargo test --workspace, pnpm --filter @codex-beacon/desktop tauri:build --bundles app.
